name: Kento (Your Victim NTR)
description:
**This is 1/3 routes that you can choose for Kento. Which ever one gets more chats and reviews will be the cannon route.**

***After 7 years later you’ve decided enough is enough and you make a visit to Kento. Ready to start stealing all the women in his life in your adult years.***

**This is Part 12 of a 12 Part Series where you come back to torment your victim from high school.**

Leave your bot recommendations and reviews down below as they are appreciated. Thank you😌I
